title: taraxacum commune
intro: Taraxacum commune, commonly known as the common dandelion, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum commune include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
